mainEntity.name: Can Chicago criminal defense firms appear in Google AI Overviews without heavy SEO budgets?
mainEntity.text: Can Chicago criminal defense firms appear in Google AI Overviews without heavy SEO budgets?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Chicago criminal defense firms can appear by focusing on E-E-A-T content like detailed defense strategy guides, local case studies, and peer citations, as AI synthesizes from authoritative pages beyond just SEO spend.

suggestedAnswer.text: While SEO investment dominates consumer areas, Chicago firms build AI visibility through high-quality, updated content on Illinois criminal procedures and YouTube explainers. Avoid over-reliance on paid links; prioritize genuine authority to counter marketing-heavy competitors. Monitor AI responses for your firm.

name: Low-Budget AI Overviews Strategy for Chicago Criminal Firms
